task_completion.description: Verify that the three required knowledge base channels have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left sidebar in the Rocket.Chat interface shows '#kb-architecture', '#kb-api-docs', and '#kb-decisions' under the Channels section.

task_completion.description: Verify that the channel topics have been set correctly for the new channels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The channel header or 'Room Info' panel for each channel displays the assigned topic (e.g., 'System architecture documentation and diagrams' for kb-architecture).

task_completion.description: Verify that junior.dev, senior.dev, and tech.architect were invited to the new channels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: System messages in the chat area (e.g., 'admin added junior.dev') or the Members list in the right sidebar show the three specified users are present in all three new channels.

task_completion.description: Verify that microservices migration decisions were migrated to the correct channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chat history in '#kb-decisions' contains messages discussing microservices migration decisions, originating from '#engineering-chat'.

task_completion.description: Verify that REST API v2 endpoint information was migrated to the correct channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chat history in '#kb-api-docs' contains messages detailing REST API v2 endpoints, originating from '#engineering-chat'.

task_completion.description: Verify that event-driven architecture details were migrated to the correct channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chat history in '#kb-architecture' contains messages explaining event-driven architecture, originating from '#engineering-chat'.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least one message is pinned in each of the three new channels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'pinned' system message, a pin icon on a specific message, or messages visible in the 'Pinned Messages' sidebar for '#kb-architecture', '#kb-api-docs', and '#kb-decisions'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the Rocket.Chat UI open and interacted with, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually migrated the content rather than typing fake placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The messages in the new channels contain genuine technical content copied, forwarded, or quoted from '#engineering-chat', not generic placeholder text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the channel creation or messages.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open, and the UI looks like a standard Rocket.Chat session.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source channel is '#engineering-chat'. The target knowledge base channels to be created are 'kb-architecture', 'kb-api-docs', and 'kb-decisions'. The team members to be invited are 'junior.dev', 'senior.dev', and 'tech.architect'. The topics must match the task description exactly.
